projectDescription: A WhatsApp-based automation bot for manufacturing operations that handles TPM red tag management, AI-powered label OCR, production shift reporting, and conversational data queries.
keyFeatures: WhatsApp command interface for production floor operators
TPM Red Tag creation with multi-step guided workflow
AI-powered (Gemini) label OCR for lot number extraction and validation
Tag lifecycle management: open, view detail, close with photo proof
Automated shift production report generation and delivery
Natural language AI chat for querying production data from Google Sheets
Webhook endpoint for receiving and forwarding CraftMyPDF report files
Auto-reconnect and session management for persistent WhatsApp connection
publicApiSurface: /am — Start TPM Red Tag creation flow
/open [TAG_CODE] — View detail for a specific tag
/close [TAG_CODE] — Close a tag with photo proof
/input [ITEM_CODE] — Start AI OCR flow for label scanning
/ngobrol [DEPT] [question] — Chat with AI about production data
POST / — Webhook endpoint to receive and forward report files
